blended.narrative: Pine Knob is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 56°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 56°F.
Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
